div.head: Mr. Egan to Mr. Blaine.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
Santiago, January 12, 1891. (Received January 14.)

div.p: On night of 6th instant six ships of Chilean navy, at instance of congressional majority, revolted and still lie inactive off shore; are now declared outlawed. Large number of opposition leaders on board. Army seems solid for President. The Government so far maintains perfect order throughout country.
